title: alangium vitiense
intro: Alangium vitiense is a species of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae, commonly known as the Fiji alangium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Alangium vitiense include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory infections, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, which is then used to treat various ailments, or as a paste applied topically to treat skin conditions.
